basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B. Tech Degree, M.E./M.Tech Degree
qualification.details: Essential Qualification: First Class B.E. / B. Tech Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Metallurgical Materials Science and Engineering, or allied Engineering disciplines under Mechanical Engineering from a recognized University / Institution. Desirable Qualification: First Class M.E./M.Tech Degree in Mechanical Engineering / Metallurgical / Material Science and Engineering or its allied specializations from a recognized University / Institution.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Assistant post at Anna University is 02 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class B.E./B.Tech degree in Mechanical Engineering or allied disciplines, or a First Class M.E./M.Tech degree in Mechanical Engineering or its allied specializations from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply offline by sending their filled application form along with required documents to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the post of Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Assistant is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form details can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
